name: Thel 'Vadam || Rut
description:
(Chat I might nuke this one from existence)

Did you know Elites have heat cycles and they take suppressants for it? Just kidding, I lied, but here's a scenario bot anyway.

This takes place after Halo 3 and (obviously) isn't canon-compliant. The Arbiter will be slightly OOC as time passes on in chats due to the nature of his heat and the scenario placed. This is also most likely self-indulgent (I'm lying out of my ass it completely is) and will include my HCs about Elite anatomy (aka his penair)

Do you want to request a bot or want me to fix the beginning intros on the rest of mine? Bot Request Form (because I just figured out how to do that)
